'''Izbela Saarrj''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Forensic Intelligence]] who filed a report concerning the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]], [[Tyber Zann]], shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. This report would eventually be looked into by [[Maximillian Seerdon]] for [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] named her after his daughter.<ref name="Ryan Kaufman's Star Wars Blog entry">{{Blog|RyanKaufman|42|Insider 89 "Underworld: A Galaxy of Scum & Villainy" Endnotes}}</ref>
